projects.title: ⚛️ React Learning Flashcards
projects.description: An interactive, feature-rich platform designed for mastering React.js core concepts through a structured flashcard system. This Single Page Application (SPA) serves as both a study tool and a demonstration of modern frontend architecture.

projects.title: 📝Responsive Semantic Static Layout 'Furniture'
projects.description: This project is a fully responsive landing page for a furniture store (static landing page), developed from a professional Figma design. It focuses on high-quality adaptive layout, ensuring a seamless user experience across mobile, tablet, and desktop devices. The implementation emphasizes clean code structure, modern CSS techniques, and pixel-perfect accuracy.

projects.title: 🍳Recipe Catalog — Global Recipe Hub
projects.description: RecipeCatalog is a modern web application designed to serve as a centralized directory for culinary recipes from around the world. Instead of hosting full cooking instructions, the project acts as an aggregator where users can store essential information about various dishes (origin, calories, cook time) and keep direct links to the original full recipes. It’s a perfect tool for organizing a personal collection of favorite international meals in one place.
